scripts.build: bash -c 'VERSION=$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version") && esbuild browser.js --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/kf-browser-sdk-v$VERSION.min.js --format=iife --target=es2018 && cp dist/kf-browser-sdk-v$VERSION.min.js dist/kf-browser-sdk.min.js'
scripts.push: bash -c 'source .env && VERSION=$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version") && aws s3 cp dist/kf-browser-sdk-v$VERSION.min.js s3://$S3_BUCKET/browser-sdk/kf-browser-sdk-v$VERSION.min.js --region $AWS_REGION --content-type application/javascript && aws s3 cp dist/kf-browser-sdk.min.js s3://$S3_BUCKET/browser-sdk/kf-browser-sdk.min.js --region $AWS_REGION --content-type application/javascript'
